response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified 'Gatchaman no Uta' by text in the corner at 00:04. Performed search: 'Gatchaman no Uta Japanese and English lyrics'. Found lyrics and translation. 
2. Identified 'Kinnikuman Go Fight!' by text in the corner at 02:44. Performed search: 'Kinnikuman Go Fight! Japanese and English lyrics'. Found lyrics and translation. 
3. Divided video into 2 scenes based on the song changes and the transition animation.
response.global_summary: A 2-song anime opening theme medley performed by various Hololive VTubers in a 3D stage setting. The video features a performance of 'Gatchaman no Uta' followed by 'Kinnikuman Go Fight!', both notable anime theme songs.

scenes.description: VTubers perform the song 'Gatchaman no Uta'. Title appears on screen at 00:04.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hololive VTubers (La+, Lui, Koyori, Chloe, Iroha)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
だれだ だれだ だれだ
空の彼方に踊る影
白い翼のガッチャマン
命をかけて飛び出せば
科学忍法 火の鳥だ
飛べ 飛べ 飛べ ガッチャマン
行け 行け 行け ガッチャマン
地球は一つ 地球は一つ
おお ガッチャマン ガッチャマン
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Who is it, who is it, who is it
That shadow dancing in the sky
It's the white wings of Gatchaman
Leaping on faith in the science technique firebird
Fly, fly, fly, Gatchaman
Go, go, go, Gatchaman
The Earth is one, the Earth is one
Oh, Gatchaman, Gatchaman

scenes.description: VTubers perform the song 'Kinnikuman Go Fight!'. Title appears on screen at 02:44.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Go! Go! Muscle!
リングに 稲妻走り
炎の戦士をてらす
飛び散れキン肉ビーム
勝利に向かって
私は (ドジで) 強い (つもり)
キン肉マン
走る (すべる) 見事に (ころぶ)
ああ 心に愛がなければ
(Uh~ Uh~ Uh~ Uh~)
スーパーヒーローじゃないのさ (Ha~)
キン肉マン Go Fight!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Go! Go! Muscle!
Lightning runs in the ring
Illuminating the warrior of flames
Muscle beams scatter
Heading towards victory
I'm (clumsy but) strong
Kinnikuman!
Running (slipping) and brilliantly (falling)
Ah, if there is no love in your heart
(Uh~ Uh~ Uh~ Uh~)
You are not a superhero (Ha~)
Kinnikuman Go Fight!
